svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.6.1 Chrome/142.0.7444.265 Electron/39.8.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.6.1"> <diagram id="TlZxEqC_BkJSXrCJCRjx" name="pageWithNumber"> <mxGraphModel dx="-1094" dy="-230" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="2200" pageHeight="1400" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;" value="LFLIX Master Roadmap: Timeline + Dependencies + Risk Overlay" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="980" x="40" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=32;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Phase 1 (Weeks 1-3)
Reliability Foundation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="640" x="60" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1a" parent="p1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Testing Baseline" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1b" parent="p1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Structured Logging" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1c" parent="p1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Validation Schemas" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="420" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1d" parent="p1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="Transaction Wrappers" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="120" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p1e" parent="p1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=12;" value="CI Quality Gates" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="340" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=32;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Phase 2 (Weeks 4-6)
Architecture and Performance" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="640" x="760" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2a" parent="p2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Cache Policy + TTL" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2b" parent="p2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Store Refactor" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="220" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2c" parent="p2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Typed API Client" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="420" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2d" parent="p2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Download Persistence" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="120" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p2e" parent="p2" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=12;" value="Perf Dashboards" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="180" x="340" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3" parent="1" style="swimlane;startSize=32;rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="Phase 3 (Weeks 7-9)
Security, Mobile, Release" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="420" width="640" x="1460" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3a" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Rate Limits + Auth Hardening" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="210" x="20" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3b" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Authorization Audit" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="250" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3c" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Component Standards" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="170" x="440" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3d" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Mobile/Web Unification" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="120" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="p3e" parent="p3" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=12;" value="Release Automation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="190" x="330" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="kpi" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=12;" value="KPI Bar: Coverage | API p50/p95 | Cache Hit Ratio | Download Resume Rate | Auth Blocks | Change Failure Rate" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="1320" x="420" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Risk: Refactor churn" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="120" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Risk: Cache staleness" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="460" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Risk: Legit users throttled" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="800" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="r4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=11;" value="Risk: Mobile regressions" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="1160" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Mitigation: CI gates + small slices" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="120" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Mitigation: Invalidation rules + fallback" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="220" x="460" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Mitigation: staged rollout + tuning" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="240" x="800" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=11;" value="Mitigation: compatibility mode + smoke tests" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="230" x="1160" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p1_p2" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;" target="p2" value="Gate A"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_p2_p3" edge="1" parent="1" source="p2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.35;entryX=0;entryY=0.35;" target="p3" value="Gate B"> <mxGeometry target="p2a" value="dependency"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e_test_store" edge="1" parent="1" source="p1a" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" target="p2b" value="safety net"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell
